name: Fettucine with Zucchini and Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fettuccine until al dente.
2. Cut the zucchini into julienne strips.
3. While the pasta is cooking, sauté the mushrooms and zucchini in butter for 2 minutes.
4. Add the half-and-half to the sauté; reduce heat and simmer for 3 minutes.
5. Add the cooked fettuccine to the sauté along with cheese and parsley, and toss to mix well.
